sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, content VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, content) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!');
SELECT locate('World', content) AS position FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Hello Virtuoso!' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT locate('Virtuoso', content) AS position FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
